lean_declaration:
theorem simpleTransposition_sq_eq_one {n : ℕ} (i : Fin (n - 1)) : simpleTransposition i * simpleTransposition i = 1 := by
  simp [simpleTransposition, Equiv.swap_mul_self]
notes: Proof uses the involution property of transpositions (Equiv.swap_mul_self).
The theorem states that a simple transposition is its own inverse.
